meta.title: AIcon — 10x your business with AI
meta.description: AIcon delivers data foundation + change management + AI implementation for teams that want to operate 10x faster, sharper, and leaner.

hero.title: AI-ify your
hero.subtitle: We make teams 10× faster, sharper, and leaner with AI — through data foundation, vertical playbooks, and change management.

crisis.title: 95% of AI pilots fail.
crisis.body: Companies spend ~$35B/year on GenAI, yet according to MIT NANDA research, 95% of pilots show no measurable P&L impact. The problem isn't the model — it's data foundation, process, and change management.
crisis.source: Source: MIT NANDA · GenAI Divide (n=300+ initiatives)

items.title: Data Foundation
items.body: 91% of organizations say data foundation is essential for AI; only 55% have one. We close that gap — schema, quality, pipelines, RAG-ready.

items.title: Vertical Implementation
items.body: Ready playbooks for customer support, sales ops, marketing, and internal automation. Not a cheap prompt-shop — production-grade agents with proper data wiring.

items.title: Change Management
items.body: Team enablement, KPI definition, measurement framework, and adoption ramp. AI without change management = 95% pilot failure.

steps.title: Audit
steps.body: 2 weeks — map current workflows, data, tooling, and pain points.

steps.title: Blueprint
steps.body: 2 weeks — solution architecture, playbook selection, ROI projection.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: 6 weeks — implementation, data plumbing, agent deployment, integration.

steps.title: Operate
steps.body: Monthly retainer to maintain, iterate, scale.

proof.title: Our own team automated 90% of internal processes with AI.
proof.body: We did this for ourselves first — before selling it. Now we transfer those playbooks to your team.

cta.title: Is your business ready to AI-ify?
cta.body: Book a free 30-minute audit. Get ROI projection and an initial roadmap.
